title: centrosema virginianum var. genuinum
intro: Centrosema virginianum var. genuinum, also known as wild cowpea or sensitive plant, is a perennial legume native to the Americas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infection. Its health benefits include the ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in the treatment of various digestive issues. Centrosema virginianum var. genuinum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
